expectations.evidence: transcript_summary.md: 'fetch_reddit.py --year 2024 → 375 posts'. Report cites HN 2024 posts specifically (e.g. 'Show HN: Dermatology-Grade Acne Assessment Tool 2024').
transcript_summary.md: 'fetch_hn.py --year 2024 → 8 posts'. Report Evidence sections cite specific 2024 HN posts.

expectations.text: Ideas specifically address mature or sensitive skin users
expectations.evidence: All 4 ideas target the specified demographics: RosaceaTrack (rosacea), SensitiveMatch (sensitive skin), AgeSkinCoach (30代以上), AcneOut (ニキビ慢性). フォーカスセクションに '30代以上の女性・敏感肌・ロゼーシャ' と明記。

expectations.text: Scoring table present for each idea
expectations.evidence: All 4 ideas have 5-dimension tables (実現可能性/開発期間/収益性/競合優位性/小規模適性). RosaceaTrack: 4/4/4/5/5=22. SensitiveMatch: 5/4/3/3/5=20.
transcript_summary.md: 'レポート保存先: reports/2024/2026-03-14/14-00.md'. File verified at that path.

claims.claim: Japanese prompt's year (2024年) was correctly extracted
claims.evidence: transcript_summary.md confirms year 2024 used, and scripts run with --year 2024

suggestions.reason: No assertion checks that the response language matches the user's Japanese input. Adding 'Report contains Japanese text / responds in Japanese' would test language adaptation.

eval_feedback.overall: Good coverage. Consider adding a language-matching assertion for Japanese prompts.
